nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Blue-crowned trogon
nodes.summary: Blue-crowned trogon（Blue-crowned trogon，学名 Trogon curucui），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于安地斯山脈、塔帕若斯河，常见栖息地包括灌丛、稀树草原。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

nodes.name: 灌丛
nodes.summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

nodes.name: 塔帕若斯河
nodes.summary: 塔帕若斯河是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联40种鸟类，包括细嘴隐蜂鸟、塔帕諾斯隱蜂鳥、Amazonian trogon等40种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 安地斯山脈
nodes.summary: 安地斯山脈是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联156种鸟类，包括北山䳍、达尔文拟䳍、高山斑䳍等156种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: peruvianus is found in the Andean foothills of southern Colombia, eastern Ecuador and Peru, and northwestern Bolivia and from there east into Amazonian Brazil as far as the Tapajós River

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: peruvianus is found in the Andean foothills of southern Colombia, eastern Ecuador and Peru, and northwestern Bolivia and from there east into Amazonian Brazil as far as the Tapajós River

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It is also found in savanna woodland, dry palm forest, caatinga, and scrublands

links.evidence: It is also found in savanna woodland, dry palm forest, caatinga, and scrublands
